mapper.sql: u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.department_id, u.status, u.password_hash, u.version
mapper.select: select u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.department_id, u.status, u.password_hash, u.version from sys_user u where u.id = #{id}
select u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.department_id, u.status, u.password_hash, u.version from sys_user u where u.username = #{username}
mapper.update: update sys_user set username = #{username}, real_name = #{realName}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, department_id = #{departmentId}, status = #{status}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select role_id from sys_user_role where user_id = #{userId}
select r.code from sys_user_role ur join sys_role r on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = #{userId}
select id, password_hash as passwordHash from sys_user
